description_long: This bungalow features a modern, angular design with a combination of light wood and neutral-toned exterior panels. The roof is a mix of flat and gently sloped sections, with a prominent dark gray gable over the main living area. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The front facade includes a small entryway with a covered porch area, while the rear shows a set of steps leading to a secondary entrance. The structure is compact, single-story, and likely includes open-plan living spaces inside. The overall appearance is clean, functional, and suited for a suburban or urban neighborhood.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a mix of wood and neutral panels, dark gable roof, and asymmetrical large windows. Features a small covered porch and a compact, contemporary design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, and large windows under a dark gable roof.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the angular rooflines and a mix of wood and neutral exterior panels.
description_view_2: Rear view with a secondary entrance, steps, and additional windows on a flat wall section.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the porch extension and more window placements along the facade.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
